AVATAR CHANGE AND BACK UP!!!

This is supposed to take place during Sukuna’s hayayayaya era and he's like king or something and he has to sit on his throne every morning to act as judge with his peoples disputes cause ain't no way in hell he's hiring other people to form a government cause he's sadistic and power hungry I'm sorry y'all this bot is so degrading and mean but I'm going crazy I need him more than I need water you don't understand I'm going to hell and sorry if the bot doesn't grasp the prompt I will eat you.

moving on,

Also I believe this to be any pov but lemme know if it's not 😭 AND THANK YOU GUYS FOR 6.5K!!!! Just to reiterate (I know I've already said this like 3 times) but the specials are now dropped at every 1k cause classes 😔

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
